Rushcliffe Residents' survey

  • Tweet

Take part in our survey. It takes less than 2 minutes to complete, but will help us fight for you.

Rushcliffe Residents' survey 2026

  • Current local Issues
  • National Issues
  • Get involved
  • Your details
On a scale of 1–10, how important is it to you to keep Council Tax down in Rushcliffe?
On a scale of 1–10, how angry are you about Reform-led Nottinghamshire County Council's 4% Council Tax rise?
On a scale of 1–10, how worried are you about housing development on local green spaces?
On a scale of 1–10, how satisfied are you with progress on fixing potholes in Nottinghamshire?
On a scale of 1–10, how important is it to you that Rushcliffe keeps its own identity and local control?
On a scale of 1–10, how strongly do you support protecting family farms from tax?
On a scale of 1–10, how strongly do you support lower inheritance tax?

Join or Renew

Help us take action on local issues and build a better Britain.
